summary: Frontend regression test after adding chips + bubble logo + tarot front. One full guided shuffle executed on mobile (412x915) with zip 10001 + surprise-me. Verified reveal timeline (shuffling dark tarot backs -> landed tarot card with photo inset by skeleton hands -> result card). Also verified desktop layout & mobile header wrap.

ui_bugs.issue: FOOD chips list DOES NOT include 'Steakhouse'. In Home.jsx FOOD_CUISINES the order is Italian, Mexican, Chinese, Japanese, Sushi, Indian, Thai, Korean, Vietnamese, Chicken Wings, Fried Chicken, Burgers, Steakhouse... but GuidedFlow.jsx uses `chips = (cuisineMap[mode] || []).slice(0, 12)` which cuts at index 11 -> Steakhouse (index 12) is excluded. Visible chips confirmed via data-testid: only 12 shown, no Steakhouse. Fix: move Steakhouse earlier in FOOD_CUISINES OR increase slice limit.

issues: Buttons wrap into 3 rows below logo (Guided/sound/Sponsor y=72, Favorites/Download y=122, Add spot y=172). No horizontal clipping (scrollWidth=clientWidth=412). Layout is functional; whether 3-row height (~231px) is desired is a UX call.

missing_testids.note: No data-testid='open-favorites' found (button labelled 'Favorites' exists). Add data-testid for testability.

missing_testids.element: Add spot open button in header
missing_testids.note: No data-testid='open-add-spot' found (button labelled 'Add spot' exists).
No data-testid='open-guided' – guided modal auto-opens on first visit but a testid should exist for reopening it.

verified_features: App loads without console errors on desktop (1440x900) AND mobile (412x915).
Bubble logo visible in header (glossy 'FF' sphere).
Guided wizard opens; Food/Drinks/Bars/Desserts interest chips selectable.
BAR_CUISINES: 'Brewery' and 'Distillery' are at positions 0 and 1 in the source array (front of the chip list).
Shuffle popup shows dark tarot card-backs (red border, skull + Fork·Fate branding) while shuffling.

Landed winner card is a black tarot card with the photo CENTERED/INSET inside a red frame, held by skeleton hands. No phantom sharp-rectangle outline observed; no visible gap between card bottom and wrists.

Result card (data-testid='spin-result-card') appears fully within viewport on mobile: x=41, w=330, viewport=412 -> right-overflow = -41px. Doc scrollWidth = clientWidth = 412 (no horizontal overflow).
Result card action buttons render: Order on DoorDash, Order online, Reviews & ratings, Shuffle again, Share your fate, Share as image, Clear.
No console errors or warnings captured during the full flow.
action_items: FIX: Ensure 'Steakhouse' appears in the visible guided-flow FOOD chips. Either move 'Steakhouse' into the first 12 items of FOOD_CUISINES in Home.jsx, or increase the slice in GuidedFlow.jsx (line 66) from .slice(0,12) to a larger value (or show all).
Add data-testid attributes to header buttons: open-favorites, open-add-spot, open-guided (for reopening) — improves testability.
critical_code_review_comments: GuidedFlow.jsx line 66 uses `.slice(0, 12)` — this silently hides any chip beyond index 11 regardless of importance. Consider making the cutoff data-driven or displaying a 'See more' expander.
Home.jsx (1460 lines) exceeds the 700-line guideline; consider splitting ShufflingDeck / CardFront / CardBack / GuidedFlow wrappers into their own files.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (1 HIGH bug: missing Steakhouse chip in guided flow)

seed_data_creation: None. Only ONE Google Places-billed shuffle was run (zip 10001, surprise-me).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reveal card visuals & mobile overflow already verified (this iter and iters 39-43). The remaining open bug is Steakhouse missing from guided FOOD chips due to slice(0,12) truncation. Once main agent fixes, a lightweight re-check of the guided step-3 chips (no shuffle needed) is sufficient to confirm.
